creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to martin from comment #9)

Comment #2 reported, in part:

The data for partition 1 is:
sysid 131 (0x83),(Linux native)
    start 2048, size 122880860 (60000 Meg), flag 80 (active)

The data for partition 2 is:
sysid 5 (0x05),(Extended DOS)
    start 122888190, size 98299906 (47998 Meg), flag 0

The data for partition 3 is:
sysid 131 (0x83),(Linux native)
    start 221188096, size 716804096 (350002 Meg), flag 0

The data for partition 4 is:
sysid 7 (0x07),(Linux native)
    start 937992192, size 38774784 (18933 Meg), flag 0

But comment #7 reports:

=>       63  976770992  diskid/DISK-WD-WCAYUEP01916  MBR  (466G)
         63       1985                               - free -  (993K)
       2048  122880860                            1  linux-data  [active]  (59G)
  122882908       5282                               - free -  (2.6M)
  122888190   98299906                            2  ebr  (47G)
  221188096  716804096                            3  linux-data  (342G)
  937992192   38774784                            4  ntfs  (18G)
  976766976       4079                               - free -  (2.0M)

1 NTFS and  2 linux-data instead of 3 linux native.
(But the sizes seems a match.)

More seems odd here.
